description: Free browser games for kids ages 5-12. No ads, no tracking, no accounts, no downloads.

games.name: Woop Pets Clicker
games.description: Tap adorable pets to earn Woops, buy silly upgrades and unlock 12 wacky pets from Blobby to THE WOOP.

games.name: Merge Squad
games.description: Buy silly toys, merge matching toys into mightier ones and battle a rival toybox with foam bonks and water balloons.

games.name: Trap Land
games.description: Help a nervous marshmallow outsmart 12 levels of sneaky traps, vanishing floors and doors with trust issues.

games.name: Wing It
games.description: Flap a tiny chick through candy striped pipes, grab sparkly stars and chase your best score.

games.name: Speed Slope
games.description: Roll a glossy ball down a neon slope, dodging glowing blocks and edge gaps as the speed gets wild.

games.name: Road Hopper
games.description: Hop across busy roads, ride logs over rivers, dodge speedy trains and unlock 8 silly characters.

games.name: Noodle Arena
games.description: Steer your dayglo noodle, gobble glowing orbs, boost past 12 silly rival snakes and climb to number 1.

games.name: Sky Stack
games.description: Tap to drop candy blocks with perfect timing and build your tower from dawn into the starry night sky.

games.name: Beat Bounce
games.description: Bounce a neon cube over spikes and gaps that land right on the music, across three chiptune levels.

games.name: Slice Rush
games.description: Flip a friendly kitchen knife across the counter, slice melons, cakes and jelly, and chain big combos.

games.name: Bubble Tank Duel
games.description: Drive bubble tanks through a maze, bounce shots off the walls and pop your buddy, or battle a silly robot. Two players on one screen.

games.name: Merge Drop
games.description: Drop cute animals into the jar and match pairs to merge them all the way up to the legendary Unicorn.

games.name: Tap Rush
games.description: Sprint through a sunrise meadow as a speedy cartoon fox, leap over rocks and cacti, and grab stars for combos.

games.name: Drift & Collect
games.description: Hold to drift a chunky toy racecar around a night carnival track and scoop up risky coin lines.

games.name: Color Pop
games.description: Aim the friendly cannon, bounce shots off the walls and pop bright bubbles in threes for big cascades.

games.name: Block Stax
games.description: Slide, spin and stack seven cheerful pieces, clear full lines and chase the mighty QUAD.

games.name: Rope Rush
games.description: Hold to hook a rope, release to fly, and carry your momentum across 20 levels of stars, saws and slime.
